title: Quanta Services (PWR) Hits 52-Week High: What's Driving It?

title: Energy Transition Will Power Quanta Services' Long-Term Growth Strategy
text: Quanta Services issued a beat and raise at Q1'23. Grid modernization and renewables will power Quanta Services' growth through the next decade+.

title: 7 High-Reward Stocks Riding the Green Energy Boom
text: I've long been upbeat on green energy stocks in general and renewable stocks in particular. With the world's largest governments tremendously backing the switch to renewable energy and the electric-vehicle revolution greatly increasing the electricity demand, it was obvious to me that the best renewable names would be very high-reward stocks.

title: Quanta Services (PWR) Tops Q1 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: Quanta Services (PWR) came out with quarterly earnings of $1.24 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $1.10 per share. This compares to earnings of $1.37 per share a year ago.

title: Quanta Services (PWR) to Post Q1 Earnings: What to Expect?
text: Seasonality is likely to impact Quanta Services' (PWR) Q1 results despite more demand for infrastructure solutions that help support customers' energy-transition initiatives and modernization.
